title: León, Castile and León — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to León, Castile and León: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

León is a city in Castile and León with a population of 125,000. A historic city on the French Way of Santiago, with a breathtaking Gothic cathedral and stunning modernist architecture.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
